reason: Round1 improves body density and fixes sidebar orientation, but final product-quality acceptance is not claimed because paragraph rhythm and overall visual similarity still need a stricter source-vs-output pass.

dimensions.evidence: Round1 body font profile uses source_scale=1.04 and max_pt=10.45; body text is visibly denser than the previous policy output, but paragraph rhythm still differs from source.
Inter-paragraph gaps are reduced by larger body text, but Chinese paragraphs remain shorter than the English source in some regions.
Blank space near the article end is allowed; it is not treated the same as excessive gaps between active paragraphs.
layout_policy.draw_modes.vertical_nav uses rotated_text; candidate side navigation labels are no longer stacked character-by-character.
Overall product-quality visual acceptance remains blocked pending stricter paragraph rhythm and typography-density judgement.
